title: explore above and beyond
description: you're able to explore the world, fight its bosses, and discover its deepest secrets.
body:
This modpack blends exploration, progression, and high-tech innovation into a cohesive experience. Travel through diverse biomes, uncover rare structures, and build advanced machines that push your world forward. Whether you're delving deep into ruins or automating your entire base, this pack delivers a balanced mix of danger, discovery, and engineering creativity.

Whether you want to conquer the skies, or design complex machines, this pack delivers a balanced journey for adventurers and inventors alike.

REMINDER: like my other modpacks, you can comment on any issues you may have with the modpack, and always remember this is just a project I’m working on for fun, so don't expect me to work on it all the time.
